Custom Reports

Projects

Tickets promoted to projects with all their sub-tickets. End users see each sub-ticket in their My Tickets.

No projects yet. Open a ticket and click Convert to Project to get started.

Trash

Deleted tickets stay here for 30 days. After that they're permanently removed automatically. You can restore or permanently delete any ticket here.

Trash is empty.

My Reminders

Personal tasks & reminders. Only you can see these. Optionally link to a ticket, attach voice notes / screen recordings / files, and choose how you want to be reminded.

No reminders yet — click "+ New Reminder" to add one.

Mentioned

0 waiting your reply

Open tickets where someone @-mentioned you. Click any one to jump straight in — you have access even when you're not assigned.

No open mentions. You're all caught up.

Notifications

Mentions, ticket assignments, and due reminders. Click any one to jump straight to the ticket.

Snoozed Tickets

Tickets you've parked. They'll return to your main list automatically when the snooze ends. Click Wake up now to bring one back early.

Nothing snoozed. Open any ticket and click "Snooze" to park it for up to a week.

Docs

Workspace document library — upload files, link to external docs (Google Sheets / Notion / etc.), or write markdown notes. Anyone can read / write.

Request update

Email this user a single message with 0 tickets. They get one link per ticket and a notification in-app for each.

Snooze ticket

The ticket disappears from your main list until it wakes up, then comes back automatically. Max 7 days. The requester is notified and keeps seeing it in their list with a "Snoozed until" pill.

🔁 New project from template

Pick a saved template — we'll create a parent project plus one child ticket per template task. {project} placeholders in task titles get replaced with the project name.

📱 Install as desktop app

🎤 Microphone Test

Use this to check that your microphone works before recording voice notes in tickets. Records for up to 5 seconds, then plays it back.

✓ Saved
Saved automatically — this mic will be used for voice notes everywhere in the app. Device names appear once you've granted microphone permission at least once.
Click "Start Test" to begin.
Input level (should move when you speak)

Email → Ticket (Gmail add-on)

                
Turn any email in your Gmail into a ticket with one click. Open the setup page to generate your personal API token and copy the Apps Script code you'll paste into Google.

              

              
                
                Open setup
              
            

          


          

            

              

                
Danger zone

                
Permanently delete your account. This cannot be undone.

Flavor Launch Tasks

          
When you create a new flavor, one ticket is created per row below. Use {flavor} in the title to insert the flavor name.

          

          

            
            

              
              
            

          

        


        
        

          
Announcements

          
Posts here appear in the What's New sidebar feed for everyone. You can also keep the popup behavior — if Require acknowledgement is on, a popup appears on every page until the user dismisses it. Otherwise it shows once.


          

            
Create new announcement

            

              
              
            

            
            
            

            

              

                
                
              

              

                
                
              

            

          


          
Existing announcements

          

        


        
        

          
Apps

          
Quick links to other apps your team uses (Slack, Drive, Syruvia Lab, an internal dashboard, etc.). Anyone in the workspace sees these in the sidebar; only admins can add or remove them.


          

            
Add a new app

            

              
              
              
            

            

              
              
            

          


          
Existing apps

          

        


        
        

          
Recurring Projects

          
Save bundles of tickets that you create over and over (e.g. "Email campaign for web customers" → 3 tickets). From the Projects page, an admin can pick a template and spawn the whole project + all its child tickets in one click. Use {project} in a task title to insert the project name.


          

            
New template

      Remind me about this ticket
      
    

    
    

      
      Right now:
      —
      
    

    

      We'll email you at the date and time you pick. Reminders are personal — only you get them.
    

    

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
      

    

    

      
Your reminders for this ticket

      

    

    

      
      
    

  






  

    

      Close Ticket?
      
    

    

      You're about to close #TKT-1042.
      This will mark the ticket as resolved and stop further activity. You can reopen it later if needed.
    

    
    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
    

  







  

    

      Assign Ticket
      
    

    

      Pick a ticket and the team member you want to assign it to. The current assignee will be notified by email.
    

    

      
      

        
        ▾
        

      

    

    

      
      
—

    

    

      
      

        
        ▾
        

      

    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
    

  







  

    

      📤 Send to WorkTrack
      
    

    

      Create a one-time work task in WorkTrack from this ticket. The selected worker will see it in their queue and can start tracking time.
    

    

      
      
—

    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
    

  







  

    

      Set Reminder
      
    

    

      Get reminded by email when this date arrives so this plan doesn't fall off your radar.

Capture the idea now — promote it to a ticket when ready.

      + New Flavor Launch
      
    

    

      Adds a list of tickets for everyone involved in the launch. Edit the task list in
      Settings → Flavor Tasks.
    

    

      
      
    

    

      
      
      Each task's due date is computed as launch + the offset configured in Settings.
